speaker: speaker1
text: Good morning , may I speak with Professor Clark , please ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You are speaking with Professor Clark .

speaker: speaker1
text: Professor , I am Kalina from your morning literature class .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , how can I help you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I ran my car into a tree yesterday and need to miss a few days of school .

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , my God ! I hope you are all right .

speaker: speaker1
text: I have a concussion , but I will be OK .

speaker: speaker2
text: How much school will you miss ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I only need to take this week off .

speaker: speaker2
text: I appreciate you calling and telling me that you won ’ t be in class . See you next week !
